Security
Security

Security & Compliance

Your infrastructure data is protected with enterprise-grade security measures and compliance certifications.

Encryption

All data is encrypted in transit and at rest using industry-standard AES-256 encryption.

Access Controls

Role-based access control (RBAC) ensures only authorized users can access your infrastructure data.

Audit Logging

Comprehensive audit logs track all actions and changes for security and compliance.

Compliance

We maintain SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, and GDPR compliance certifications.

Security Practices

Infrastructure Security

  • • Multi-factor authentication (MFA) required
  • • Regular security audits and penetration testing
  • • Automated vulnerability scanning
  • • Secure API endpoints with rate limiting

Data Protection

  • • Data encryption at rest and in transit
  • • Regular automated backups
  • • Data retention policies
  • • GDPR-compliant data handling
AlertMend

Production operations for Kubernetes & AWS. Connect inventory, observe everything, automate the toil. AI-native. Works with your stack.
